summary: Accepted refinement: scoped claims are ephemeral coordination input, not truth. Store active claims under a runtime/ephemeral path and keep graph as a derived read-only claims view; do not write claims directly into generated graph state.

accepted_decisions.summary: Move claim lease storage away from the old top-level claim file to an explicit runtime/ephemeral path.
Graph remains derived view only: runtime claim store -> graph/status/state views.
Claims are gitignored, not canonical truth, not archived, and not history.

assumptions: No backward-compatible alias is required because this change immediately follows the first claim implementation and user prefers fixing breakage over deprecated paths.
non_goals: Do not store claims only in the generated graph.
Do not make claims canonical truth.

knowledge: Update docs/README/skills/config references to runtime claim store.
code: Update claims path, templates, smoke tests, gitignore.
